title: Dungeon Crawl Feed
subtitle: Floor Broadcast // Princess Donut Network

quote_card.speaker: Carl
quote_card.flavor: Recorded after extensive explosions and at least one terrible decision.

famous_line_card.speaker: Donut
famous_line_card.flavor: Certified royal outrage. Volume excessive. Accuracy unquestioned.

quest_card.objective: Deliver one unstable merchant through the food court without triggering a clown nest.
quest_card.warning: Failure may result in dismemberment, mockery, or poor reviews.

store_price_card.note: All sales final. Screaming at staff incurs a handling fee.

footer: Dungeon management denies responsibility for curses, lava, or influencer involvement.
